old_value: {"id":"smallhold-naww.10","title":"push: reqwest::Client::new() per notification is wasteful","description":"File: src/push.rs:send_push_inner. Each push notification creates a new reqwest::Client (which internally creates a new connection pool, TLS context, etc.). Since notifications fire from spawned tasks at unknown rates, this allocates and tears down a full HTTP client per push. Store a shared Client in AppState or use a module-level LazyLock\u003creqwest::Client\u003e.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T22:40:03.907355877Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T22:40:03.907355877Z","labels":["efficiency","review"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"smallhold-naww.10","depends_on_id":"smallhold-naww","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T22:40:03.941779673Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
